title: Streng geheim
writer: Heinz Hafke, Hans Lucke, Harry Thürk
actors: Helmut Schreiber, Peter Marx, Norbert Flohr
plot: The "Concordia" trading company in Würzburg is a secret headquarters of the MID, a secret service agency of the US Army. For years, espionage, sabotage, and diversion operations originated from here in order to undermine the Socia...
